name: Boss Farming | The Boss You’ve Been Farming Becomes Aware
description:
On your latest expedition to acquire legendary loot from a boss monster, you find yourself encountering a boss who had seemed to be able to recall his memories after each of his deaths. How will you handle this? Will you keep killing him for the loot or see if there’s another way?

I was scrolling through TikTok and saw the most recent short by CircleToonsHD and was intrigued by the boss in the animation. Being that it’s been a while since I’ve made a character, I wanted to try writing again as practice for creating scenes and scenarios. Without further ado, please enjoy the bot and let me know what you liked!

(Any errors found with it and commented are very appreciated!)
creator: Sboi
